Localization.Description: A process launch is allowed or blocked

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The process {object.process.name} is launched on host {event_src.host}. Continuing to process other rules.
The launch of the process {object.process.name} is allowed on host {event_src.host}
The launch of the process {object.process.name} is blocked on host {event_src.host}
The Application and Device Control module is ready on host {event_src.host}
